The '''EVO Troopers''' ('''Environmental''') were a specialized variant of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] that acted as support units, or working in hazardous environments. The very heart of this variant consisted of stormtroopers that expressed hatred towards [[Alien/Legends|Non-Humans]]. They were equipped with [[FA-3 flechette launcher]]s.

==Overview==
[[File:MissiontoRaxusPrime.jpg|thumb|left|210px|Camouflage EVO Troopers [[Second mission to Raxus Prime|fighting]] [[Galen Marek|Starkiller]] on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].]]
Equipped with heavy enhanced armor with [[Breathing tube/Legends|breathing tube]]s and undergoing special training, EVO troopers were able to survive and operate in the most hazardous of conditions such as extreme heat, acid rivers, and lightning. They were equipped with [[FA-3 flechette launcher]]s, although some utilized [[T-21 light repeating blaster/Legends|T-21 light repeating blasters]] and [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]].<ref name="The Force Unleashed" />

==History==
The bulk of EVO troopers were selected from groups of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who expressed hatred towards [[Non-huMan|Non-Humans]], making them more aggressive toward the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] populace they encountered on harsh [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. EVO troopers could be encountered wherever extreme environmental [[Ground warfare/Legends|battlefield]] conditions existed and several were posted on the science ship ISS ''[[Empirical]]'', [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]], [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], and even the unfinished [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="The Force Unleashed" />

==Appearances==
